facebook.caption: Sorting out your dong before exploring Phu Quoc? EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market is a handy currency exchange tucked right into the night market area on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. With a perfect 5/5 rating across 38 reviews, travelers clearly trust this spot to give them a fair deal without the stress. Pop in before you browse the market stalls, grab local cash, and enjoy the rest of your evening worry-free. Tip: always count your notes on the spot before walking away.
